name: Charlie Murphy
bio: Charlie Murphy was an American stand-up comedian, actor and writer, and the older brother of Eddie Murphy. He gained national fame as a writer and cast member on Comedy Centrals Chappelles Show, especially the True Hollywood Stories sketches recounting his encounters with Rick James and Prince. He later toured as a headlining stand-up and released the special I Will Not Apologize.

timeline.ev: Enlisted in the US Navy, served six years
Joined Chappelles Show as writer and performer
Released stand-up special I Will Not Apologize

accolades: Breakout fame from Chappelles Show True Hollywood Stories sketches

machine.reason: zero clips on file — every comic needs at least 1 official clip
